reviews.review_description: This game is Rad!!

One of the most interesting and better games I have played recently and which I recorded on my channel.

To me it looks like a combination of Pistol Whip and SuperHot with a note of InDeath: Unchained.
This is the gem that you look for in the ocean of small games. With proper development, a real crystal can be created from this gem, because the game has a huge, huge potential.
Great game and great job done by the developers
It's a blend of Superhot and Arcaxer. Please add a map editor for community levels/puzzles.
Where’s the update? 1/8?
The game makes me feel very cool

reviews.review_title: A lot of fun, and a lot of potential
reviews.review_description: Quick and fun kind of play, that will have you playing levels over and over to improve your times and scores.  A few details in the game  are still rough around the edges, but the core of the game is already on point.  Way to go dev!

reviews.review_title: It's the sequel that Superhot deserves
reviews.review_description:
See my first impressions review here: 
https://youtu.be/AaVbgW2X2Bo

Want Superhot 2? Wish it existed? This is probably as close as you'll get! This game is so much fun, the mechanic where you can only move by teleporting to the falling weapon of an enemy you just killed is genius; get the order wrong and you're stranded! Action and strategy in a really great combination, fantastic work!

This game is so good, it's like Superhot....but not really. It's a checkers or chess game and superhot had a baby. It makes you move, it makes you think, it's fantastic.

The only bad thing is that I want more of it - would easily pay $20-$30 for this game.....but it's free so that's even better.

Hope the developer keeps improving it!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much!  More (much more) is coming soon, stay tuned

reviews.review_description:
Feels like super hot with the fun scenarios it throws you into. Time slows with bullets and there's even a stealth mechanic for some levels with suppressors! So far I've had a blast with this, I keep getting a new feeling with at least every other level. The fact there is multiple ways to do many levels is fun as well. Like the blackout level allowing you to throw a bottle to distract is simple but fun.
The biggest flaw I had was getting stuck and not being able to move when I grabbed the blue guns, that mechanic makes it much harder and fun since you have to plan where they drop. But also when weapons despawn it makes it difficult unless you have real space to look around a corner to shoot/grab a weapon and occasionally enemies won't spawn because you're just outside of its range.

There are indicators where to go at times I feel like you should be able to teleport to those it would probably help that

For free I would 1000% recommend trying this. If it's a bit longer I'd probably pay for it

reviews.review_title: Fun game with so much potential
reviews.review_description: Wasn't quite sure what to expect from this game but was pleasantly surprised. You shoot enemies and grab their weapons to move forward. You need to be strategic in who you kill and which path you take to ensure you can complete the mission. Definitely worth giving this game a try. The basic game mechanic is sound. I look forward to the game being further developed and polished. I can see this game becoming a must play game.

reviews.review_title: I cant believe this is free
reviews.review_description: This is one of best games I've played in a while. If you like superhot, this game is like superhot on crack. Play this game!
What can I say the other reviewers haven’t said? Just download it! One of the few gems I’m the app lab garbage heap!

Great game but bugs are often present (I know this is an alpha.) All the levels have great design and you have often think of what your gonna do and plan ahead. But the level Temple run is buggy. The whip even if it connects with its target doesn't do anything half the time. And the the room with the falling celling in the same level? Yeah apparently your supposed to kill the guy on the ledge teleport to him then turn around and hit the target with your whip? That took me a while to figure out. Oh and curving bullets? Sounds cool, right? Not really, the game throws you in a level with you on a train and the V.I.P in a building. The window is closed at first but opens once the train go's past it, you figure out by the description your supposed to curve the bullet and hit the target only problem is.. The game never tells you how. So, you have to look up a YouTube video to find out how to do it and.... It barley works. It's extremely hard to hit targets and feels like it never goes where you want too. I spent 20 minutes on the level before giving up. Great game but I would recommend tuning up the whip, bullet curving (and adding a tutorial) fixing bugs and the level design of Temple run.

Really had a blast playing this game. I highly recommend everyone that likes games like pistol whip and super hot don't miss this one. It isn't a knock off it's definitely its own thing and it's very fun and well done. The people that made this did very well.
I like it how you have to be vigilant on who you kill is where you move
Littarly better than superhot
Ngl I’m surprised this game is free. It’s a really unique and fun game with challenging levels, lots of melee and ranged weapons, and has some really fun modifiers. So 5 stars from me.
Best game ever
Amazing

reviews.review_title: Wow, one of the best game on the Quest 2
reviews.review_description: In the same vein as pistol whip and SuperHot. You get a simple gameloop but pushed to the absolute extreme. Lots of content and variations.
